title: Codereview pass 3: scheduled_send exceptions - No further issues
description:
Code review pass 3 - final check:

**Checked:**
1. Exception handling pattern matches codebase conventions (line 343 uses same pattern)
2. CancelledError handling is correct (re-raise without logging, per asyncio best practices)
3. Log message format is consistent with other logger.exception calls
4. No performance concerns - exception path only hits on actual errors
5. Return type annotation still accurate (Task[bool])
6. Docstring remains accurate (returns Task, caller should await it)

**Finding:** No additional issues found.

The fix is minimal, correct, and follows established patterns.
